message:
feat(mvcc): implement lock-free CAS-based chain head table (bd-688.3)

Replace the mutable HashMap-based chain head table with a sharded,
CAS-based atomic chain head table for lock-free concurrent access:

- New ChainHeadTable struct with 64 shards of AtomicU64 slots using
  pack/unpack for VersionIdx with CAS loops and retry for lock-free
  head pointer updates
- CAS retry histogram metrics (record_cas_attempt, cas_metrics_snapshot)
  in observability module for monitoring contention
- Refactored prune_page_chain and gc_tick to accept &ChainHeadTable
  instead of &mut HashMap
- Updated all tests and benchmarks to use the new table
- Added bd-688.3 latch-free version chain end-to-end test and
  verification script with proptest regression cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc 7c4c4b9c972860fea065a1ab7e58cb57a03fd22a43e3cca902e06f1ce46a61bd # shrinks to count = 2

@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+# bd-688.3: Latch-free MVCC Version Chain (Hekaton-style)
+#
+# Verification script for CI evidence collection.
+set -euo pipefail
+
+BEAD="bd-688.3"
+echo "=== ${BEAD}: Latch-free MVCC Version Chain ==="
+
+# 1. Unit tests in fsqlite-mvcc (invariants + gc modules).
+echo "--- Step 1: fsqlite-mvcc unit tests ---"
+cargo test -p fsqlite-mvcc -- invariants::tests gc::tests --nocapture 2>&1
+echo "PASS: fsqlite-mvcc unit tests"
+
+# 2. Harness integration tests for this bead.
+echo "--- Step 2: harness integration tests ---"
+cargo test --test bd_688_3_latchfree_version_chain -- --nocapture 2>&1
+echo "PASS: harness integration tests"
+
+# 3. Clippy (workspace-wide, deny warnings).
+echo "--- Step 3: clippy ---"
+cargo clippy -p fsqlite-mvcc --all-targets -- -D warnings 2>&1
+echo "PASS: clippy clean"
+
+echo "=== ${BEAD}: ALL CHECKS PASSED ==="
